project.name: Piver Tract
project.summary: Piver Tract is a proposed major residential subdivision in Hampstead. The Pender County preliminary plat package describes 358 single-family homes on about 147.5 acres east of Highway 17 and southeast of Country Club Drive. The plans show private roads open to public use, sidewalks, trails, boardwalks, waterfront amenities, community docks, a community boating facility, a community center, a sales center, wetlands, floodplain areas, and stormwater ponds.
project.locationDescription: Eastern side of Highway 17 and southeast of Country Club Drive, along Spring Garden Road near Olde Point and Country Club Drive in Hampstead.
project.latestUpdate: Pender County lists SUBMAJ 2026-147 Piver Tract Preliminary Plat as pending, last updated March 25, 2026.
project.nextStep: County technical review and any public hearing or appeal status should be verified before final publication.

communityConcerns.summary: The project is near Highway 17, Country Club Drive, Spring Garden Road, Olde Point Road, and existing neighborhoods. The package identifies private roads open to public use, but trip totals and required road improvements were not verified from the extracted text.

The plans label wetlands, coastal wetlands, a normal high water line, CAMA setback areas, 100-year flood line, Old Topsail Creek, and Nixon's Mill Creek. All wetlands are noted as remaining undisturbed as passive open space.
The stormwater narrative says runoff will be conveyed to four wet detention ponds and designed for the 2-, 10-, and 25-year events, with the 50-year event analyzed for overtopping.

The overall plan lists 20.26 acres of open space, including 10.13 acres of active open space and 10.13 acres of passive open space in wetlands. Amenities shown include trails, boardwalks, docks, boating access, parks, mailbox areas, and a community amenity area.
The preliminary plat package describes 358 single-family homes on about 147.5 acres.

reviewFlags.message: Application page says 358 single-family homes. Stormwater narrative describes 355 lots plus 3 existing lots. Keep 358 as the public total unless county staff clarifies otherwise.
Overall site plan labels total acres as approximately 147.5. Public notice and MDP references should be checked before final publication if exact acreage matters.
Status is set to Pending based on Pender County's Major Subdivisions list, last updated March 25, 2026. Verify current status before public launch.
The plan sheet references MDP 2025-81 as approved on January 6, 2026, but current county MDP listings should be checked before describing the MDP as approved.
No verified traffic impact totals or required road improvements were extracted from the package text.
Graphics suggestions identify likely pages, but the user should choose final sheets in the Graphics workflow.
